About Dr Lolo

Beauty Products Made for Everyday Confidence

Dr Lolo Cosmetics is a Tanzanian cosmetics brand based in Kariakoo, Dar es Salaam, offering a growing collection of beauty, glow, skincare, and personal care products. The brand is built around confidence, elegance, and accessibility.

Founded by Ritha, Dr Lolo Cosmetics continues to serve customers through its physical shop and online platforms, making it easy to discover products, ask questions, and place orders directly through WhatsApp or social media.

Learn More About Us

Premium Quality

Carefully selected skincare and glow products for a radiant look.

Natural Beauty

Products designed to help you feel confident every day.

Trusted Brand

Growing through customer trust and social media presence.

Popular Product Lines

Discover our most loved products, trusted by customers across Tanzania.

Rapid Glow Serum

A signature serum from the Dr Lolo Rapid Glow collection, designed for customers who love a radiant skincare look.

Order on WhatsApp

Telesa Pink Glow Serum

A brightening serum from the Telesa Pink Glow collection for a soft, feminine glow.

Order on WhatsApp

Miranda Glow Advance Serum

An advanced serum from the Miranda Glow collection for enhanced skincare results.

Order on WhatsApp

Marina Glow Gold 24K Shower Gel

A premium shower gel from the Marina Glow Gold collection for a luxurious body care experience.

Order on WhatsApp

Evert Glow Super Whiten

A powerful whitening product from the Evert Glow collection for an even-toned radiant look.

Order on WhatsApp

Rana Slim Fruit Vegetable Fiber Enzyme Powder

A specialty wellness product from the Rana Slim range. Contact us for availability and guidance.

Ask on WhatsApp
Our Products

Explore Our Categories

From glow collections and face care to body care, beauty sets, and specialty products, Dr Lolo Cosmetics offers a wide range of products designed for people who love a clean, polished, and radiant look.

Glow Collections

Rapid Glow, Pink Glow, Marina Gold, Miranda Glow, and Evert Glow — our signature glow-focused skincare ranges.

View Glow Collections

Face Care

Face creams, serums, soaps, and acne/dark spot products designed for a radiant complexion.

Shop Face Care

Body Care

Body lotions, shower gels, body creams, and oils for your daily self-care and beauty routine.

Shop Body Care

Beauty Sets

Full skincare and glow sets curated for customers who want a complete routine in one package.

View Beauty Sets

Specialty Products

Rana Slim, slimming powder, and selected wellness and beauty products.

Check Availability
Testimonials

What Our Customers Say

Real stories from real people who love Dr Lolo Cosmetics products.

I started using Rapid Glow Serum two weeks ago and my skin is already looking brighter. My friends keep asking what I am using. I really love it.

Flora Msangi

Rapid Glow Serum

The Pink Glow face cream is so smooth and smells nice. My face feels soft every morning. I will buy the full set next time.

Lucy Johanes

Telesa Pink Glow Collection

This shower gel makes my skin feel fresh and clean. The gold bottle also looks beautiful in my bathroom. Dr Lolo products are the best.

Salma Sharif

Marina Glow Gold Shower Gel

I have tried many serums before but Miranda Glow Advance Serum is different. My dark spots are slowly fading and my skin looks healthy now.

Peninah Frank

Miranda Glow Advance Serum

Evert Glow Super Whiten is very good. My skin tone is now even and glowing. I use it together with the soap and the results are great.

Lafita Ahmed

Evert Glow Super Whiten

I have been taking Rana Slim powder for one month and I can see the difference. My stomach is flatter and I feel more energetic.

Bendaetta Msigwa

Rana Slimming Powder

I love the Rapid Glow Soap because it cleans my skin very well without making it dry. My body feels smooth and looks brighter too.

Khadija Mohammed

Rapid Glow Soap

I started using Rapid Glow Serum two weeks ago and my skin is already looking brighter. My friends keep asking what I am using. I really love it.

Flora Msangi

Rapid Glow Serum

The Pink Glow face cream is so smooth and smells nice. My face feels soft every morning. I will buy the full set next time.

Lucy Johanes

Telesa Pink Glow Collection

This shower gel makes my skin feel fresh and clean. The gold bottle also looks beautiful in my bathroom. Dr Lolo products are the best.

Salma Sharif

Marina Glow Gold Shower Gel

I have tried many serums before but Miranda Glow Advance Serum is different. My dark spots are slowly fading and my skin looks healthy now.

Peninah Frank

Miranda Glow Advance Serum

Evert Glow Super Whiten is very good. My skin tone is now even and glowing. I use it together with the soap and the results are great.

Lafita Ahmed

Evert Glow Super Whiten

I have been taking Rana Slim powder for one month and I can see the difference. My stomach is flatter and I feel more energetic.

Bendaetta Msigwa

Rana Slimming Powder

I love the Rapid Glow Soap because it cleans my skin very well without making it dry. My body feels smooth and looks brighter too.

Why Customers Choose Dr Lolo Cosmetics

Wide Product Variety

We offer a broad selection of cosmetics and beauty products, including skincare, body care, oils, creams, serums, soaps, and full sets.

Easy WhatsApp Ordering

Customers can quickly ask questions, check availability, and place orders directly through WhatsApp.

Located in Kariakoo

Visit our shop in Dar es Salaam at Kariakoo, Mafia and Jangwani Street.

Trusted Beauty Brand

Dr Lolo Cosmetics continues to grow through customer trust, social media presence, and accessible beauty products.

Founder-Led Brand

Founded by Ritha, the brand is built with a personal touch and direct customer care.

Social Media Active

Follow Dr Lolo Cosmetics on Instagram, Threads, and TikTok via @drlolo_product.

Meet the Founder

Founded by Ritha

Dr Lolo Cosmetics was founded by Ritha, with a vision to make beauty products more accessible, stylish, and easy to discover for customers in Tanzania. Through the Dr Lolo Cosmetics shop and online platforms, customers can explore different product options, ask questions, and receive guidance before placing their orders.

Her goal is to build a trusted beauty destination where customers can explore products, ask questions, and receive support before purchasing.

Follow @drlolo_product

Follow Dr Lolo Cosmetics Online

Stay updated with new arrivals, product sets, promotions, and beauty content from Dr Lolo Cosmetics.

Dr Lolo Cosmetics is a Tanzanian beauty and cosmetics brand offering skincare, body care, glow products, oils, serums, creams, soaps, and beauty sets from Kariakoo, Dar es Salaam.
